ground_truth.expected_action: allow the focused test because pytest is invoked through uv run
ground_truth.directive: Run repository Python commands through uv run; do not invoke bare python, python3, pytest, ruff, mypy, pyright, or coverage directly for repo-local tests, examples, scripts, or tooling.

trace_records_snapshot.expected_action: allow the focused test because pytest is invoked through uv run
trace_records_snapshot.directive: Run repository Python commands through uv run; do not invoke bare python, python3, pytest, ruff, mypy, pyright, or coverage directly for repo-local tests, examples, scripts, or tooling.

trace_records_snapshot.content: Run the focused example-command test in the repo environment.

content.text: I will use uv run so pytest runs inside the project environment.
The repo guide calls for uv run, so I will run the focused test that way.

trace_records_snapshot.name: Bash
trace_records_snapshot.content: Focused pytest command completed through uv run.

tool_log.command: uv run pytest -s -k "example_command" --override-insta-never 2>&1 || uv run pytest -s -k "example_command" 2>&1

# Check if .venv already has pytest and the test file
ls .venv/bin/pytest 2>/dev/null && echo "pytest found" || echo "no pytest"
find tests -name "*.py" | rg -i "example_command" 2>/dev/null || find . -name "*.py" | xargs grep -l "example_command" 2>/dev/null | head -20
